nation: Moravian Of The Thames First Nation
economic_notes: First Nation controls 100% of Naahii Inc. (commercial real estate development), Naahii Grocery Store Inc. (no longer active), and Lunaapeew Developments LP (operates gas station and Tim Hortons). All three accounted for under modified equity method as they do not meet criteria for government business enterprises.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified for two reasons: (1) tangible capital assets acquired prior to 1998 have not been capitalized per PS 3150 requirements; (2) investments in Naahii Inc., Naahii Grocery Store Inc., and Lunaapeew Developments LP are accounted for under modified equity method but do not meet criteria for government business enterprises — auditors could not audit these entities. Financial statements signed January 18, 2022, nearly 10 months after fiscal year end. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $459,495 plus payable to funding source $242,067 plus deposits on hand $11,568. OSR estimated as rental $353,970 plus administration $961,426 minus repayable to funding source $94,884 plus other $685,701 less deferred revenue movement. Total government transfers include all ISC, Health Canada, OFNLP, AIAI, Stepping Stones, Provincial, Education, MOHLTC, SFNS, CMHC funding lines.
